name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-34
title: SKILL.md drift: legacy worktree path, nonexistent slash command, missing list determinism docs; feature.json surface.skills empty; no contract.md
description:
Multiple drift sites in rabbit-file documentation and metadata:
1. SKILL.md lines 57 and 217-222 still illustrate the legacy fixed-path worktree (.claude/tmp/bug-backlog-files) that spec.md:88-90 forbids; current code uses per-process .claude/tmp/bug-backlog-files-<pid>.
2. SKILL.md line 87 references '/rabbit-file file' slash command but line 16 declares 'there are NO slash commands.'
3. SKILL.md List Protocol omits the determinism / sort-by-name contract from spec.md:60-66 (BUG-30) and the distinct 'branch missing' message.
4. feature.json declares surface.skills: [] but SKILL.md exists; surface declaration is wrong.
5. rabbit-file has no docs/spec/contract.md despite spec-rules §2 mandating 'Every component declares its contract.' Every other feature has one.
Fix: update SKILL.md to current per-pid worktree path; remove the bogus slash-command reference; add the determinism/sort contract docs; populate surface.skills; create a docs/spec/contract.md following the format used by other features.
